title: dortmanna scaevolifolia
intro: Dortmanna scaevolifolia, also known as the Scaevola, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Scaevola include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Scaevola can be found in teas, infusions, and topical creams, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
